{{Quote|That ''Mining Explorer...!'' I ''recognize'' it! It's the same ''House of Tagge'' ship that was ferrying ''TIE fighters'' to Yavin to attack the ''Rebel base'' there!|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="SW33" />}}
A '''Mining Explorer''' was a large utility craft used for research and exploration.<ref name="SW25" />

==Characteristics==
The ships were clad with a green-colored hull and had an array of three engines at the stern.<ref name="SW25" /> Hangars were located towards the mid-section of the vessel.<ref name="SW33" /> A Mining Explorer was about 500 meters long, if we consider the shadow the vessel projects over a Tagge Battle Cruiser. The ships were capable of operating in most of the planetary atmospheres.

==History==
{{Quote|It's a House of Tagge ''Mining Explorer!'' At one time or another that entire ''family'' has given us trouble.|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]|<ref name="SW33" />}}
The ships were used by the [[Tagge Mining Company]], a subsidiary of [[Tagge Company/Legends|Tagge Company]]. They were originally designed when other megacorporations refused to provide ships to Tagge Company in an effort to stifle their business. They served as bulk freighters/survey ships/colony transports.<ref name="Galaxy of Intrigue">''[[Galaxy of Intrigue]]''</ref>
However its main use in the outer rim was the search of spice, hence its nickname "Spice Sniffer,"<ref name="SW33" /> deploying probes from the great ventral bay.<ref name="SW26">[[Star Wars (1977) 26|''Star Wars'' (1977) 26]]</ref>

Baron [[Orman Tagge/Legends|Orman Tagge]]<ref name="SW25" /> and his sister [[Domina Tagge/Legends|Domina]] often used a Mining Explorer as their [[Flagship/Legends|flagships]].<ref name="SW50" />

{{Ship-stub}}
